tasks.title: Verify existing API filter support for check-in status
tasks.description: Test if the GET /api/event-ticket-transactions endpoint supports filtering by checkInStatus.equals parameter.
tasks.details:
- Test the endpoint with checkInStatus.equals=CHECKED_IN query parameter
- Verify that results only include transactions with check_in_status='CHECKED_IN'
- Document the results and response format
- Test with various values (NOT_CHECKED_IN, CHECKED_IN, etc.)
- Share findings with the frontend team
tasks.testStrategy: Send requests to the endpoint with different checkInStatus.equals values and verify the response contains only matching records by comparing with direct database queries.

tasks.title: Verify existing API filter support for check-in time range
tasks.description: Test if the GET /api/event-ticket-transactions endpoint supports filtering by checkInTime date range parameters.
tasks.details:
- Test the endpoint with checkInTime.greaterThanOrEqual parameter using ISO 8601 format
- Test the endpoint with checkInTime.lessThanOrEqual parameter using ISO 8601 format
- Test both parameters together to verify date range filtering
- Document the results and response format
- Share findings with the frontend team
tasks.testStrategy: Send requests to the endpoint with various date range parameters and verify the response contains only records within the specified date range by comparing with direct database queries.

tasks.title: Verify combined filter support with pagination and sorting
tasks.description: Test if the GET /api/event-ticket-transactions endpoint supports combining multiple filters with pagination and sorting.
tasks.details:
- Test the endpoint with combined filters: eventId.equals, checkInStatus.equals, checkInTime range
- Test with pagination parameters (page, size)
- Test with sorting parameter (sort=checkInTime,desc)
- Verify that all filters work together correctly
- Document the results and response format
- Share findings with the frontend team
tasks.testStrategy: Send requests with combined filters, pagination, and sorting, then verify the response contains correctly filtered, paginated, and sorted data by comparing with direct database queries.

tasks.title: Verify statistics endpoint date range support
tasks.description: Test if the GET /api/event-ticket-transactions/statistics/{eventId} endpoint supports date range filtering.
tasks.details:
- Test the statistics endpoint with startDate and endDate query parameters
- Check if the endpoint accepts ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Verify if the response includes data filtered by the date range
- Document the current response format and date range support status
- Share findings with the frontend team
tasks.testStrategy: Send requests to the statistics endpoint with different date range parameters and verify if the response data is correctly filtered by the specified date range.

tasks.title: Verify check-in update endpoint functionality
tasks.description: Test if the PATCH /api/event-ticket-transactions/{id} endpoint correctly updates check-in related fields.
tasks.details:
- Test updating checkInStatus to 'CHECKED_IN'
- Test updating checkInTime to current timestamp
- Test updating numberOfGuestsCheckedIn
- Verify all fields update correctly
- Document the response format
- Share findings with the frontend team
tasks.testStrategy: Send PATCH requests with different check-in related field updates and verify the database is updated correctly with the new values.

tasks.title: Implement duplicate check-in validation
tasks.description: Add validation to prevent duplicate check-ins for the same transaction.
tasks.details:
- Add validation logic to the PATCH endpoint
- Check if transaction is already checked in (checkInStatus='CHECKED_IN')
- Return 409 Conflict error if already checked in
- Include appropriate error message in the response
- Test the validation with already checked-in transactions
tasks.testStrategy: Attempt to check in an already checked-in transaction and verify that a 409 Conflict response is returned with an appropriate error message.

tasks.title: Implement transaction status validation for check-in
tasks.description: Add validation to prevent check-in of REFUNDED or CANCELLED transactions.
tasks.details:
- Add validation logic to the PATCH endpoint
- Check transaction status before allowing check-in
- Prevent check-in if status is 'REFUNDED' or 'CANCELLED'
- Return 422 Unprocessable Entity error for invalid status
- Include appropriate error message in the response
- Test the validation with refunded and cancelled transactions
tasks.testStrategy: Attempt to check in transactions with different statuses and verify that REFUNDED and CANCELLED transactions cannot be checked in.

tasks.title: Implement tenant validation for all endpoints
tasks.description: Ensure all endpoints properly filter by tenantId for multi-tenant security.
tasks.details:
- Review all endpoints used by the QR scanner and reporting features
- Verify that tenantId.equals filter is applied correctly
- Ensure users can only access data for their own tenant
- Return 403 Forbidden for cross-tenant access attempts
- Test with different tenant IDs
tasks.testStrategy: Send requests with different tenant IDs and verify that users can only access data for their own tenant and receive 403 Forbidden for cross-tenant access attempts.

tasks.title: Create check-in analytics aggregation endpoint (optional)
tasks.description: Implement the optional GET /api/event-ticket-transactions/check-in-analytics/{eventId} endpoint for pre-aggregated check-in analytics.
tasks.details:
- Create new endpoint for check-in analytics aggregation
- Support startDate and endDate query parameters
- Calculate totalTickets, checkedInCount, notCheckedInCount, noShowCount
- Calculate checkInPercentage
- Aggregate checkInsByHour data
- Aggregate checkInsByTicketType data
- Determine peakCheckInTime and averageCheckInTime
- Filter by date range if provided
- Include dateRange in response
tasks.testStrategy: Send requests to the new endpoint with different date ranges and verify the response contains correctly aggregated check-in analytics data.

tasks.title: Create sales analytics aggregation endpoint (optional)
tasks.description: Implement the optional GET /api/event-ticket-transactions/sales-analytics/{eventId} endpoint for pre-aggregated sales analytics.
tasks.details:
- Create new endpoint for sales analytics aggregation
- Support startDate and endDate query parameters
- Calculate totalSales, totalRevenue, netRevenue
- Calculate totalDiscounts, totalRefunds, averageTicketPrice
- Aggregate salesByDate data
- Aggregate salesByTicketType data
- Aggregate salesByPaymentMethod data
- Filter by date range if provided
- Include dateRange in response
- Exclude REFUNDED and CANCELLED transactions from calculations
tasks.testStrategy: Send requests to the new endpoint with different date ranges and verify the response contains correctly aggregated sales analytics data.

tasks.title: Add date range support to statistics endpoint (optional)
tasks.description: Enhance the existing GET /api/event-ticket-transactions/statistics/{eventId} endpoint to support date range filtering.
tasks.details:
- Modify the existing statistics endpoint to accept startDate and endDate parameters
- Filter statistics by purchase_date within the given date range
- Include dateRange object in the response
- Ensure backward compatibility with existing clients
- Test with various date ranges
tasks.testStrategy: Send requests with different date ranges and verify the response contains statistics filtered by the specified date range.

tasks.title: Add database indexes for performance optimization
tasks.description: Add recommended database indexes to improve query performance for check-in and sales analytics.
tasks.details:
- Create index on (event_id, check_in_status) for check-in status filtering
- Create index on (event_id, check_in_time) for check-in time filtering
- Create composite index on (event_id, check_in_status, check_in_time) for check-in queries
- Create index on (event_id, purchase_date) for sales analytics
- Test query performance before and after adding indexes
- Document performance improvements
tasks.testStrategy: Measure query execution time before and after adding indexes to verify performance improvements.

tasks.title: Implement caching for analytics endpoints (optional)
tasks.description: Add caching support for analytics endpoints to improve performance for frequently accessed data.
tasks.details:
- Add caching to check-in analytics endpoint
- Add caching to sales analytics endpoint
- Add caching to statistics endpoint
- Set appropriate cache expiration time
- Implement cache invalidation when data changes
- Test caching performance
- Document caching implementation
tasks.testStrategy: Measure response time for initial and subsequent requests to verify that caching improves performance.

tasks.title: Create comprehensive API documentation
tasks.description: Document all endpoints, request parameters, and response formats for the QR scanner and reporting features.
tasks.details:
- Document all endpoints used by the QR scanner feature
- Document all endpoints used by the reporting features
- Include request parameters and their formats
- Include response formats and field descriptions
- Document error responses and status codes
- Add example requests and responses
- Update Swagger API docs
tasks.testStrategy: Review the documentation with the frontend team to ensure it accurately describes all endpoints and provides sufficient information for integration.

tasks.title: Create integration tests for all endpoints
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive integration tests for all endpoints used by the QR scanner and reporting features.
tasks.details:
- Create tests for QR verification flow
- Create tests for check-in flow with validations
- Create tests for check-in history with filters
- Create tests for sales analytics
- Test multi-tenant security
- Test error handling
- Test edge cases
- Automate tests for CI/CD pipeline
tasks.testStrategy: Create automated integration tests that cover all endpoints, validations, and error cases, and run them as part of the CI/CD pipeline.

tasks.title: Document verification results for frontend team
tasks.description: Create comprehensive documentation of all verification results for the frontend team to use during implementation.
tasks.details:
- Document filter support verification results
- Document statistics endpoint date range support
- Document check-in update endpoint functionality
- Include example requests and responses
- Include any limitations or workarounds
- Share documentation with frontend team
- Address any questions from frontend team
tasks.testStrategy: Review the documentation with the frontend team to ensure it provides all necessary information for their implementation.
